steps.title: Use the anxious effect
steps.content: The sentence says boredom creates anxious tension and induces not sleep but something else. The blank must name an agitated or uneasy state, not calmness or laziness.

steps.title: Choose the disturbed state
steps.content: The matching word means disturbance or agitation, which fits the anxious tension described. Choice A means courage or endurance, Choice C means casual unconcern, and Choice D means laziness or sluggishness. The answer is B.
